Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to common questions.

What is Hi-there.net?
Hi-there.net is a resource hub providing information, news, and community tools for members across the country.
How do I join?
Click the "Join" button in the header or footer to create your free member account.
Is membership free?
Basic membership is free. Premium tiers with additional features are available.
How do I find resources for my state?
Visit the Blog section and select your state from the menu on the left to see local content.

Join our community of members across the country.
